project_description: To create, plan and execute events for the elderly and youths

organization.name: Lotus International Charity Foundation Limited
organization.description: 重新啟動地區外展計劃,與老年人聯繫並提供必要的服務。 專注特需兒童的未來就業發展,提供實習機會,服務長者,提供跨代共融的機會。 與地區組織建立夥伴關係,以擴大我們在服務兒童和青少年方面的影響力和有效性。We are relaunching our community outreach program to reconnect with elderly residents and deliver essential services. With a dedicated focus on future employment development for children with special needs, we will provide internship opportunities and intergenerational programs that combine youth service to seniors with meaningful cross-generational integration.By establishing strategic partnerships with local organizations, we aim to significantly expand both the reach and effectiveness of our services for children and youth.

what_we_need: Join a 30-min phone discussion to understand the mission of Lotus and the project details
Help us brainstorm, develop, plan and execute community events
Provide support on some planned events
Execute the event according to schedule
Event schedule to be determined with the volunteer and team
project_details.background: Lotus Charity Foundation just resumed actively to organise community events and we would like someone who is passionate for elderly and youth to support us in this area.
project_details.what_we_have: We have got some friendly corporations, and will have some other teammates helping the organization of these events.
project_details.why_important: These events will help Lotus to serve the public with practical results.
